summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SpotHunt app features including Landing page, BottomNav, Cannabis/Weeds page, and NavigationDrawer. Most features working correctly. One issue found: Landing page header uses old MapPin icon instead of SpotHuntLogo SVG component.

ui_bugs.issue: Landing page header uses old MapPin icon from lucide-react instead of the new SpotHuntLogo SVG component. SpotHuntLogo is imported but not used in header.
ui_bugs.fix: Replace MapPin with SpotHuntLogo component in Landing.jsx header

passed_tests: Landing page loads with SpotHunt branding
Landing page feature cards: Cannabis Spots card present (Day Planner removed)
BottomNav shows 4 tabs: Explore, Shuffle, Visit, Weeds (NO Plans tab)
Cannabis/Weeds page loads with 'Spots' as default tab (not 'strains')
Cannabis/Weeds page has sub-filters for Spots tab: All, Dispensary, Cannabis Shop, CBD Store, Hemp Shop, Coffeeshop, Head Shop
Cannabis/Weeds page has NO Journal tab
Cannabis/Weeds page Strains tab works with strain type filters (All, Sativa, Indica, Hybrid)
Cannabis/Weeds page Strains tab has effects filters (Relaxed, Happy, Euphoric, Uplifted, Creative, Sleepy, Energetic, Focused)
Dispensary feed cards on Weeds page have Directions button (30 buttons found)
Directions button opens NavigationDrawer with Google Maps, Waze, Apple Maps options
NavigationDrawer shows distance, walking time, and driving time
FeedCard on Home page has Directions button with NavigationDrawer (17 buttons found)
Home page Smoke category shows dispensary results with sub-filters
action_items: Replace MapPin icon with SpotHuntLogo component in Landing.jsx header (line 162-164)
critical_code_review_comments: Landing.jsx imports SpotHuntLogo but uses MapPin in header - should use SpotHuntLogo for consistency

success_rate.frontend: 95% (1 minor UI bug - wrong logo component in Landing header)

seed_data_creation: Completed onboarding for test user via API
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major features tested and working. Test user test@spothunt.com has completed onboarding. The only issue is Landing.jsx header uses MapPin instead of SpotHuntLogo component. NavigationDrawer integration works on both Cannabis/Weeds page dispensary cards and Home page FeedCards.

landing_page.spothunt_branding: Present but using MapPin instead of SpotHuntLogo

cannabis_weeds_page.strains_tab: Working with type and effects filters
